name: The Substation
description: Auckland's premier underground club venue, housed in a converted electrical substation in Newton. Three rooms across two floors with a dedicated DJ booth and separated smoking area. Capacity 450.

technicalSpecs.boothSetup: 2× Pioneer CDJ-3000, Allen & Heath Xone:96, 1× Technics SL-1210 Mk7, Rane SL4 interface
technicalSpecs.soundSystem: Funktion-One Res4 system, 4× F218 sub-bass units, Martin Audio W8L side fills
technicalSpecs.lighting: Robe moving heads, Martin strobes, custom LED pixel panels, full Madrix control
technicalSpecs.stagingDimensions: Booth: 3.2m wide × 1.8m deep, raised 400mm above floor. Stage: N/A (DJ-only booth)
technicalSpecs.monitorSetup: 2× Funktion-One F101 booth monitors, adjustable SPL via mixer aux

loadInInfo.accessTime: From 17:00 day of event. Full soundcheck window 18:00–20:00
loadInInfo.instructions: Enter via Surrey Lane (rear alley). Press buzzer labeled 'PRODUCTION' at the black roller door. Venue manager will meet you. Do not use the public entrance on Surrey Crescent.
loadInInfo.additionalNotes: Green room with rider facilities on ground floor. No natural light. CCTV throughout. All equipment must be signed in with production manager.

venueFee.notes: No standard venue hire fee for approved events. Revenue split negotiated per event.

name: Viaduct Warehouse
description: A raw warehouse space in Wellington's Viaduct Harbour. 600 capacity across one floor with a central DJ stage and full bar. Resident sound system from d&b audiotechnik with custom subwoofer array.

technicalSpecs.boothSetup: 2× Pioneer CDJ-3000, Pioneer DJM-V10, Pioneer CDJ-2000NXS2 (backup), no vinyl setup
technicalSpecs.soundSystem: d&b audiotechnik V-Series line array, 4× V-SUB subwoofers, Q10 frontfills
technicalSpecs.lighting: Claypaky Mythos 2 moving heads, Chauvet strobes, DMX house control
technicalSpecs.stagingDimensions: Central stage: 4m wide × 3m deep, 600mm height. Booth is stage-integrated
technicalSpecs.monitorSetup: 2× d&b E8 stage monitors, in-ear mix available on request

loadInInfo.instructions: Drive to Viaduct Harbour Ave. Loading bay is the orange door marked 'EVENT ACCESS' — 50m past the main entrance. Call the duty manager on arrival (number confirmed in advance sheet).
loadInInfo.additionalNotes: Free artist parking in Civic Carpark with validated ticket — ask production. Green room is accessed via elevator, level B1. No smoking inside.

venueFee.notes: Flat $500 NZD facility fee per event, covers full AV technician support and cleaning.

name: Flux Social Club
description: An intimate 200-cap basement bar in Christchurch's arts precinct. Monthly residency programming with a hand-built sound system and vinyl-forward DJ setup. Perfect for club nights where the music takes priority.

technicalSpecs.boothSetup: 2× Pioneer CDJ-2000NXS2, Allen & Heath Xone:43C, 2× Technics SL-1210 Mk5
technicalSpecs.soundSystem: Custom 2-way Void Acoustics system with Bassline subs, 4× Nucleus satellite speakers
technicalSpecs.lighting: Minimal — house LED wash only. Strobe available. No moving heads.
technicalSpecs.stagingDimensions: Booth is floor level, 2.4m wide × 1.2m deep. No staging.

loadInInfo.instructions: Enter from Lichfield St — black door with 'FLUX' stencil. Stairs down to basement. No loading bay — all equipment must be carried through front entrance. Maximum 2 steps down to floor level.
loadInInfo.additionalNotes: Compact green room / prep area behind the bar. Water and 1× rider drink provided. No advance hospitality for support acts.

venueFee.notes: 15% of door revenue (after first 50 tickets). Settled on the night in cash.
